goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'east' and should serve 'british' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '17:45' on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 19:15' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'birmingham new street'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the east and should serve british food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 17:45 on saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 19:15 and should leave on sunday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to birmingham new street
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
